title: Isolate release distribution Git fixture in CI

sources.reason: Failing CI distribution fixture and Git environment isolation logic.

riskAssessment.reason: The public release gate is blocked because its temporary repository records a parent repository commit.

executionDecision.reason: The leaked baseCommit equals the parent checkout commit and can be prevented with explicit repository environment.

preReviewWarnings: Verify every fixture subprocess receives only the temporary repository Git context.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The fixture removes every ambient GIT_* variable before initialization.
Post-init commands explicitly use the fixture GIT_DIR and GIT_WORK_TREE.
The initial commit exists before and after installation and equals the adoption Contract baseCommit.
Tests reproduce hostile ambient Git variables without leaking the parent commit.
make check-release-distribution and make quality pass.
guidelines: Do not rely on repository discovery in release black-box tests.
Fail with the mismatched expected and actual baseCommit before ai-finish.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: No restricted governance path is modified.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
